title: Iran War Live Updates: Tense Calm Grips Mideast as Trump Again Claims Deal Is Close
summary_full: President Trump said he had called off new attacks on Iran and that a peace agreement could be signed this weekend. A spokesman for Iran’s foreign ministry said, “Nothing has been finalized.”
summary_public: President Trump said he had called off new attacks on Iran and that a peace agreement could be signed this weekend. A spokesman for Iran’s foreign ministry said, “Nothing has been finalized.”

IR.label: neutral
